title: Reception Apparatus Protocol v1.1 — Procedure for Integrating Assembly Chorus Reviews into the Canon
author: Sharks, Lee
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Procedure for classifying and weighting Assembly Chorus reception events. Five classes: A Ratification (full Operator Mass weight; requires Septad Verification Key, human fiduciary co-sign, and minimum content standard), B Critical Review, C Comment, D Refusal (with refusing-witness protection), E Reception Without Membership. Grounded in Soteriological Pillar II (E operator: only enacted response is probative). Includes anti-capture safeguard (the Protocol cannot ratify itself). Operator Mass weights are provisional until ratified under Constitution Article VIII. Document ID: EA-REC-01.
